text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky has managed to leave quite a mark
on the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's been the center of attention since before
her debut, but now she's even more renowned.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, in the midst of all this...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: VROOOOOM! Screeeech!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Sorry I'm late, Trainer! Come on! Get in!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Sorry I'm late, Trainer! Come on! Get in!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Well... last time we went to the sea, so I think the
mountains would be a good choice!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But more importantly... why do you look so
scared?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Chillax over there! I always obey the rules of the
road, don't I?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Sure, my driving might be a little hectic at times,
but Tata gets restless!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Come on, let's go!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
We're here! Isn't hitting the redline with Tata just
the best?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Let's start training, shall we?
choice_data_list:
Why have you been training outside the
academy recently?

Why have you been training outside the
academy recently?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Huh? Isn't it obvious?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I love taking drives, but I also want to train!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I've got so many exciting rivals now, and there's
some really big races coming up, right?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'm itching to get out there and run like a speed
demon!
choice_data_list: Your excitement is definitely rubbing off on me!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Heehee! My rivals are still trying to catch up, so I
can't slow down now!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: But I don't just practice for them—it's for you too!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: But I don't just practice for them—it's for you too!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I want you to always take pride in being my
trainer!
choice_data_list: I'm with you all the way!
I'm with you all the way!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Good! We're going to have a blast!
